channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: CLARITY Act risks handing crypto to centralized players: Gnosis exec
item.description: The legislation assumes that all crypto activity must pass through financial intermediaries licensed by the US government, warns Gnosis co-founder.

item.title: You Can Control an AI Agent's Crypto Spending With Ledger Hardware Wallets and MoonPay
item.description: The Ledger hardware wallet integration lets users approve AI-driven crypto transactions on-device while keeping private keys secure.

item.title: The SEC and CFTC join hands: State of Crypto
item.description: The SEC and CFTC signed a memorandum of understanding to do a better job providing a combined regulatory approach to the digital asset sector.

item.title: Venus Protocol hit by $3.7M in 'supply cap' attack
item.description: The threat actor manipulated the platform by using Thena tokens to bypass the maximum supply cap and borrow several different digital assets.

item.title: Crypto’s age of hype is over, making way for the real infrastructure to be built
item.description: Nikolic challenges a recent CoinDesk op-ed, declaring "crypto's rock 'n' roll era is over," and argues that it’s the best shift for the industry’s builders.

item.title: We Tested Utopai's PAI: The Best Long-Form AI Video Generator Today?
item.description: Utopai Studios built a professional-grade cinematic engine that produces stunning long-form AI video—but its learning curve can be punishing.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin promotes an update simplifying Ethereum node software
item.description: The blockchain co-founder said the goal is to make the "self-sovereign" method of Ethereum users running their own nodes a user-friendly experience.

item.title: Bitcoin set for best week since September 2025 as correlation with tech stocks weakens
item.description: Bitcoin is outperforming equities and gold since the Middle East conflict began, as institutional inflows return while broader market sentiment remains cautious.

item.title: Here is why Nasdaq and owner of NYSE are putting the $126 trillion equity market on blockchain
item.description: The race for the "everything exchange" makes Wall Street operators and crypto exchanges rivals and partners at the same time.

item.title: How Florida's Stablecoin Bill Mirrors 'Big Brother' Tools Outlawed Under Ron DeSantis' CDBC Ban
item.description: The governor, who opposes CBDCs, appears poised to sign a regulatory framework for stablecoins in Florida.

item.title: Bitcoin price teases key support reclaims with weekly close above $70K
item.description: Bitcoin edged toward an important weekly close above $70,000 that would include a reclaim of an important 200-week trend line.

item.title: BREAKING: 🇺🇸 US Energy Secretary says that Iran conflict will end in next few weeks. After that, Oil supply will go up and energy prices will dump. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5MLW5NTjNzMUVYWlpGcmR2R1cxZlF3N3k1TkhQc2V5YmF2Y2Y0c3k3T3M1UnRERXJTV1RMenV0czA5WmtMYVZBQ3NJbHR6MUdOeDhaRnFvd28tOFhvUGVB?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇺🇸 US Energy Secretary say…

item.title: How Bitcoin and Gold reacted differently to the Iran war shock
item.description: During the Iran conflict, gold attracted safe-haven demand, while Bitcoin’s reaction reflected liquidity conditions and broader market sentiment rather than acting as a classic crisis hedge.

item.title: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan revisits $1 million bitcoin — analysts agree but debate his timeline
item.description: Hougan says bitcoin could reach that milestone if it captures a larger share of the global store-of-value market, though analysts say it would likely take years of institutional adoption and macro shifts.

item.title: Forensic analysis uncovers draft of $5M deal tied to Milei’s Libra promotion: Report
item.description: Forensic analysis of lobbyist Mauricio Novelli’s phone reportedly uncovered a draft document outlining a $5 million payment tied to Argentina's president's promotion of the Libra token.

item.title: On-chain data shows Venus Protocol was suspected to suffer a flash-loan attack. The attacker address 0x1a35…6231 obtained about 20 BTC, 1.5 million CAKE, and 200 BNB, totaling over $3.7 million, after using a large amount of THE as collateral on Venus t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE00QW85ZnlyQmlrSFZXTUZnVmlCYnp2SGVXUndZR09jcDBUaG9XSTdOMzJNMFNudVdyQ1JSR20xWTJNYUkzVDVzS2lCazdqOGI2dGRuQldOcElBYTg2Q1UxMUZTSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">On-chain data shows Venus Protoc…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Stretch the Orange Dots." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9pVGF5dmxZeHhJOGNGT0Jvd1BlTm9ibjF3djF4MHQ3RnVILWJsRUFQZ05SMDJXRlZEUy1BN3hrYTA4NEVfZ0VGOVBsdzVtV1VkZElYVndydWlPVTBfdk14TVln?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: What Is AGI? The AI Goal Everyone Talks About But No One Can Clearly Define
item.description: Experts say artificial general intelligence lacks a clear definition or arrival point, despite promises from Silicon Valley and abroad.

item.title: Visa is ready for AI agents. So is Coinbase. They're building very different internets
item.description: The next trillion-dollar payments network won't have a checkout page. No card number, no CVV, no human at the keyboard. Just machines paying machines, thousands of times a second, for fractions of a cent.

item.title: AI agents are quietly rewriting prediction market trading
item.description: Valory co-founder David Minarsch says autonomous agents running on the Olas protocol are giving retail traders a 24/7, strategy-driven edge on platforms like Polymarket.

item.title: Erik Voorhees( @ErikVoorhees), an early #Bitcoin supporter and founder of ShapeShift, is buying back $ETH after a one-year break. One year ago, he sold 12,886 $ETH($42.83M) at $3,324. In the past 5 days, he has spent 17.75M $USDT to buy back 8,576 $ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAwZlMwRU1XOEktLUZBYVBpeGUyR2xJTk4xa3dBWURpaFFlc01VS255SF9xSTdnd2pZRnprbG13ZmtNX0tQQWlnVVhKMHBiOGVfcG1aNnhGZGJHUWExcHNMNUdB?oc=5" target="_blank">Erik Voorhees( @ErikVoorhees), an …

item.title: Stablecoin uncertainty could hurt banks more than crypto firms: Expert
item.description: Regulatory uncertainty around stablecoins may disadvantage banks, as crypto firms continue expanding while financial institutions wait for clearer rules.

item.title: BitMine is glad to support the efforts of the Ethereum Foundation @ethereumfndn by acquiring their ETH for a mutually agreed upon price - $BMNR continues to stack $ETH @fundstrat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1PR2lQa1RscHIyUDFWVWp4QjM2OGhtb1kxblRZeGY2VjJDZ3YxdG5reHVQWHFUdU56ZXV1Rmw1c0hkS1ptVmozOVZCMV9zME1DRDBjTWpOb2RWMmc?oc=5" target="_blank">BitMine is glad to support the efforts of t…

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇮🇷 Iran confirms ongoing military cooperation with Russia and China, calls them "strategic partners." World war... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9tV200YkRpWHQtUGczcFcxNkc1V0syMTg1MG9JZHdtNTU0V2MzcWMxU2ZlZm1pMWhSOFBTOUphbjQ2b3l6UkttclE2MXhxcGNrT2tXeXA1bDFTZGxYQzRHOC1B?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: 🇮🇷 Iran confirms ong…

item.title: Altseason is dead, expect shorter cycles and ‘violent’ rotations: Crypto exec
item.description: Only a few crypto tokens will experience price rallies and asymmetric upside, while broad altcoin market rallies are a thing of the past.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation sells $10.2M worth of ETH to BitMine in OTC deal
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation completed a $10.2 million OTC sale of 5,000 ETH to BitMine as part of its treasury management strategy to fund operations and ecosystem development.

item.title: CASH is not TRASH in a CRASH Q: Why has Warren Buffet sold stocks and bonds and is sitting with billions in cash? A: Because he is “keeping his powder dry” a.k.a. He is in CASH so he can buy priceless assets….after the crash and are on sale. Q: Should y - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9NMnZ6d3BXazJKMzJXMnVTaHRscHBpcGpSeS1SR0FBVUN6aHJUWkZVdGtqcVNqVGNCSzVRTGRHSVhDdE1FWE5qRHlZa3B1RkhsbFRQVzk0ZWtydkRHMUlRSXZ6SUM3VkE?oc=5" target="_blank">CASH is not TRASH in a CRAS…

item.title: Bitcoin whales are starting to accumulate again at $71K: Santiment
item.description: Santiment says the recent uptick in Bitcoin whale accumulation is a "positive reversal," and the platform is watching for retail selling to confirm a potential market bottom.

item.title: According to data from ultrasoundmoney, the circulating supply of Ethereum has increased by more than 1 million ETH since the Merge, bringing the total supply to around 121.53 million ETH, with an annualized inflation rate of about 0.24%. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5iYkpaNUNmMFlhdzdmTG9wVEtiaE8wUXVRaUVnU0hhaVk2bzlIMmlUV25Wc01pWUNBejFLQXlLSHhmUldRSEVLVTdWU3hVSnI4UW83b3h1cjc2cDNKWHJ5Z2M5cw?oc=5" target="_blank">According to data from ultrasoun…

item.title: Bitcoin sold off first when the U.S.-Iran war began. Two weeks later, it's outperforming nearly everything
item.description: Each escalation in the Iran conflict has been larger than the last, but each bitcoin drawdown has been getting smaller.

item.title: Erik Voorhees( @ErikVoorhees), the early #Bitcoin supporter and founder of ShapeShift, has started buying gold again after a one-month break. Since Jan 31, he created 28 new wallets, then spent $23.76M to buy 2,834 $XAUT($13.78M) and 2,019 $PAXG($9 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5KY2JkQXl3OG9GaHNmQmk4Y1B4TmFLbzJWRTdXbHNGQklDRDJGVG5QQWpOOWJ6eVRqTDdSR0ZmV1dseUdVd2duUjFaOHgxblVDY3c2b3dEeXVUUUtIZXN2b0hR?oc=5" target="_blank">Erik Voorhees( @ErikVoorhees), the…

item.title: CLARITY Act 2026 odds ‘extremely low’ if not passed before April: Exec
item.description: While many in the industry believe stablecoin rewards are the only sticking point for the US CLARITY Act, a Galaxy digital executive said more obstacles could appear.

item.title: 📊 BITCOIN: It took $BTC 11 months to climb from $70K to $125K, and just 5 months to fall back to $70K. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9aa2paWXltU1NaejlScXdndU9Hd3ItZzVmMXB3eUFOd002OUw1c3lqbVB4SjFwaVgzRFQ4WTQ0cVB3eU9VUjlTR2ZsYWloekZQbGxraURTRnR5Y2NkUHZDNUhiVVM?oc=5" target="_blank">📊 BITCOIN: It took $BTC 11 mon…

item.title: Changing Basel rules could unlock ‘huge’ liquidity for BTC: Analyst
item.description: Banks seek to deploy capital in the most efficient way possible, but capital rules under the Basel III framework make crypto holdings costly.

item.title: 🔥 NOW: Bitcoin may be nearing a historic bear market bottom as key indicators flash undervaluation, per Bloomberg. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1xdFJqcVR4SDFoRTRWSVBJRnpLUnBkdzNUamlQNnhabjFjNW5ZS0txVVRDN3NVX0NwM1BEcTMzV1pVODZZNzd6bllMS29UT244UEhsMGltVEJNLXNiV1JycXdhVmk?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NOW: Bitcoin may be nearing …

item.title: Crypto broker Bitpanda bets on banks and tokenization to expand globally ahead of IPO plans
item.description: The Vienna-based crypto broker eyes emerging markets, teaming up with institutions rather than competing with local exchanges, said Vishal Sacheendran, VP of global markets strategy and operations.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Buys $10.2 Million in ETH Directly From Ethereum Foundation
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation said Saturday that it sold 5,000 ETH for approximately $10.2 million to Tom Lee's BitMine Immersion Technologies.

item.title: Hoskinson might be wrong about the future of decentralized compute
item.description: Cardano’s founder recently made an argument about hyperscalers that needs to be addressed, says Fan.

item.title: Former UK Prime Minister Boris Johnson calls Bitcoin a ‘Ponzi scheme’
item.description: Johnson said that he could understand why gold and Pokémon cards have investment appeal but not Bitcoin, which he characterized as a scam.

item.title: Crypto’s multi-million F1 sponsorship under fire as Middle East war hits region's biggest events
item.description: Other major business events across the UAE, such as Middle East Energy Dubai and the Dubai International Boat Show, have also been postponed or delayed.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation sells 5,000 ether to Tom Lee's BitMine in $10.2 million deal
item.description: The funds will support the EF's core operations, including protocol R&D and ecosystem grants, as part of a treasury strategy to balance ETH and fiat-like assets.

item.title: Bitcoin beats stocks as Strategy’s STRC hints at $776M BTC buying potential
item.description: BTC faces bull-trap risks due to the formation of a bear flag pattern, with a measured downside target at around $51,000.

item.title: Boris Johnson calling Bitcoin a ‘Ponzi’ draws rebuttal from Michael Saylor and others
item.description: The cryptocurrency community pushed back, with Michael Saylor saying Bitcoin has no issuer, promoter, or guaranteed return, and is instead driven by code and market demand.

item.title: Judge Rejects RICO Claims in Lawsuit Over Pastor-Led Crypto Ponzi Scheme
item.description: Eddy Alexandre, who pleaded guilty to commodities fraud in 2023, is currently serving out a nine-year prison sentence

item.title: 0/ Today, the Ethereum Foundation finalized the terms of a 5,000 ETH sale at an average price of $2,042.96 via OTC. For this sale, our OTC counterparty was @BitMNR. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9lVHE5bDlfUnJQNVFwZmJmTjRXcXlBS2s1SGVLa1hqWmRyS0l5SDJWZVZFcW9IZVJpTll2S1Mwa2JpUXV3clotbXRFMHM0c2h4clhNS2treWx6UzdaYl9NQXlkVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">0/ Today, the Ethereum Foundatio…

item.title: Wall Street pushes tokenized stocks, but institutions aren’t eager to trade them
item.description: Exchanges are racing toward blockchain-based equities and 24/7 trading. Institutions, however, fear liquidity and funding risks.

item.title: Brazil industry giants representing 850 companies decry stablecoin tax threat
item.description: They argue the tax would be illegal, violating Brazil's Constitution and Virtual Assets Law, as stablecoins are not considered fiat currency.

item.title: BREAKING: Ethereum is now projected to lose its spot as the second largest cryptocurrency. 57% chance Ethereum is flipped this year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9ZUEpYa2YzRUVNZEFRWkFTeDZmRTE2MXI0Tk43ci1IUTVNMU9kcGxuaFJ0TlZRdEZ3VXV2WnVsc1FHNXBnSmRLUFR5ZHVDMjk2SHRXazZvMEg0dnZCTVhVUg?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Ethereum is now projected …

item.title: Bitcoin Hit a Major Milestone—Most Miners Won't Be Around for the Next One
item.description: Twenty million Bitcoin mined. One million left. The miners who got us here might not be around for the finish.

item.title: The math behind Strategy’s path to 1 million bitcoin by the end of 2026
item.description: The largest publicly traded corporate holder of bitcoin would need to buy roughly 6,158 BTC per week, a pace its exceeded often in recent months.

item.title: AI developers may not be keen on crypto, but stablecoins are the secret to agentic finance, crypto insiders say
item.description: The brave new world of autonomous, micro-transacting AI agents is where programmable cryptocurrencies will shine, according to stablecoin experts.

item.title: Crypto can fight money laundering without stifling financial freedom
item.description: Blockchain's transparency traces illicit flows better than fiat systems. Industry-wide information sharing and unified AML rules close gaps, without curbing liberty.

item.title: USDC market cap nears record $80B amid ‘capital flight’ in UAE: Analyst
item.description: USDC’s market cap is approaching a record $80 billion, with one analyst linking the surge to capital flight and turmoil in Dubai’s real estate market.

item.title: We should build more crypto tools for refugees and stateless people. Because there may unfortunately be many more refugees and stateless people…and from all social classes. Ukrainians leaving the war. Californians leaving the state. Gulf workers leaving t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFA2Sl9JeWFZTmhuQnB4STFUMmdlTkI3VVFBV3VGeHhZM19DNnVhWmNNd251aVlaWW45UVU2c2xfajBSVl9DOGZ5UXlFWmxjR0kxcUlPVjg4Q3VSOWRX?oc=5" target="_blank">We should build more crypto tools for refu…

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs extend inflow streak to five days for first time in 2026
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs brought in about $767 million over five straight days of inflows for the first time so far this year.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $71,000 despite Trump warning of strikes on Iran's oil-rich Kharg Island
item.description: The largest cryptocurrency is up 4.2% on the week despite Friday's reversal, with attention now turning to the Fed meeting on March 17-18 and whether oil above $100 forces a shift in rate expectations.

item.title: BlackRock says ‘exotic’ crypto ETFs not part of its strategy
item.description: BlackRock launched a staked Ether exchange-traded fund on Thursday, expanding its crypto offerings beyond its flagship spot Bitcoin and Ether ETFs that launched in 2024.

item.title: Bitcoin can survive 72% of the world's submarine cables being cut, but a targeted attack on five hosting providers could cripple it
item.description: A Cambridge study spanning 11 years and 68 verified cable failures found that Bitcoin's physical infrastructure is far more resilient than previously understood, with TOR adoption actually strengthening the network.

item.title: Stablecoins could power global payments within 10 years: Druckenmiller
item.description: The investor said stablecoins are faster, cheaper and more efficient than fiat payments running on traditional banking infrastructure.
